## What does this change?

Describe what you changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Site improvement (design, layout, accessibility)
- [ ] Content update (text, data, sources)
- [ ] Amendment language change
- [ ] New feature

## If this changes amendment language

Explain the legal or practical reason for the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run build` and it passes
- [ ] I tested on mobile and desktop
- [ ] Any factual claims include a source link
- [ ] Content follows the simple language guidelines in CONTRIBUTING.md
